title: romulea ligustica subsp. ligustica
intro: Romulea ligustica subsp. ligustica, also known as the Italian Romulea, is a perennial bulbous plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, as well as acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
